div.class: canvas-node-toolbar__items d-inline-flex align-items-center rounded-2 border shadow-sm p-1

button.class: toolbar-btn btn btn-sm btn-link p-0 border-0
button.title: Open configuration

button.class: toolbar-btn btn btn-sm btn-link p-0 border-0
toolbar-btn toolbar-btn--danger btn btn-sm btn-link p-0 border-0
button.title: Delete node

button.class: toolbar-btn btn btn-sm btn-link p-0 border-0
button.title: More options
